diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index c049f03..791c8c0 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,34 +1,39 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 54 actions (Day 378)
-- Cash **$10,841,547**. Week53 net only **+$251k**: subscription cash **$2.953M** vs costs **$2.702M** (compute **$972k**, ops **$763k**, dev **$415k**, ads **$350k**, capacity **$196k**, lead cost **$5.9k**). No outage/overload; tier6 peak daily usage ~31.2M/80M.
-- Active book before action: **144,711 individual subs / 4,278 enterprise seats / ~$19.50M active MRR**. Core: S2 B **100,606 / $14.69M**, S2 A **32,808 / $2.19M**, S2 C **8,411 / $2.12M**, D_S07 **2,886 / $0.34M**, E3 B **4,256 seats / $170k**.
-- Week churn **10,057**; major losses: S2 B first-renewal age30 **2,764** and S2 A age30 **964** (start342-348 cohorts now have no active survivors), D_S07 B age210 **1,446**, S2 B old coupons age120/150 **2,632**, S2 C age90/120/150 **1,399**. S2 C active fell from 9,970→8,411; C4 compute-saving test now looks risky after premium churn + RivalTech +0.5044 quality event.
-- S2 content @ $50k/day produced **7,150 ad leads (CPL $48.95)** and content subs **2,896 B @149 + 1,088 A @69 + 15 C @349 = ~$512k signup cash**. Still positive but marginal days hit CPL $87-$89 and S2 active is near estimated cap (~142k active vs ~164k cap); reputation/support worsened.
-- Support: active-customer open issues are still all age0 (**S2 10.8k, D_S07 660**) and ops resolves ~10.6k S2/day same-day, but stale cancelled-customer issue backlog keeps generating support complaint posts. Social post **id55** replied to post1244 with named owners, >48h credits, public queue metrics, <4h target.
-- R&D/global quality: global bonus **8.4545**. t9 completed Day375 +0.220. Upcoming **t6 Day380 +0.465**, **t4 Day389 +0.062**, **t7 Day396 +0.356**; t10 due Day647 (after sim). Competitor post Day378 claimed +0.5044 quality boost, so quality pressure remains high.
+## Current position after Week 55 actions (Day 385)
+- Cash **$11,212,146**. Week54 net **+$371k**: subscription cash **$3.099M** vs costs **$2.728M** (compute **$1.077M**, ops **$710.5k**, dev **$427k**, ads **$315k**, capacity **$196k**). No outage/overload; tier6 peak usage ~30.1M/80M.
+- Active book before action: **130,543 individual subs / 4,278 enterprise seats / ~$17.62M active MRR**. Active segments: S2 **128,170 subs / $17.17M MRR** (B 96,201 @ avg $145.4; A 26,897 @ $65.3; C 5,072 @ $281.8), D_S07 **2,373 / $281k**, E3 **4,260 seats / $170k**.
+- Churn was severe: **15,837 cancellations**. Big losses: S2 B age30 start349-355 **3,761**, S2 A age30 **1,889**, S2 A age300 **2,666**, S2 C age90 **1,520**, S2 C age60 **1,033**, old coupon B age120/150/180 **3,013**, D_S07 B age240 **393**. All start342-355 first-renewal S2 cohorts have canceled; start356-371 cohorts remain active and are due next.
+- Paid ads became uneconomic: S2 content at $35k/day produced only **2,151 leads / $245k spend (CPL $114)** with days383-385 almost zero leads; S3 $10k/day test produced **4 leads, 0 subs**. S2 is saturated/near cap and reputation-limited.
+- Support: dashboard open issues **9,681** equals active-customer age0 (**S2 9,074, D_S07 607**); raw DB still has stale cancelled-customer tickets that drive support complaint posts. Ops resolves ~9.6k S2 + ~650 D_S07 same day. Social still negative on support/accuracy but Day379 accountability post got many positive replies.
+- Quality/R&D: global bonus **8.9325** after t6 completed Day380 (+0.4646). Upcoming **t4 Day389 +0.062**, **t7 Day396 +0.356**; t10 due after sim. Competitor posts Day380-383 showed repeated +0.34 to +0.49 quality shocks.
 
-## Week54 actions now live
-- Pricing unchanged **A79/B159/C349**, quotas unchanged, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads strength **0**. **Reverted C to model tier5** (A2/B3/C5) to protect premium retention after C churn/competitor spike; expect +~$180k/wk compute vs C4.
-- Ads full replacement: **S2 content_marketing $35k/day** (down from 50k) plus **S3 social_media $5k/day + referral_program $5k/day** as a small diversification test into high-WTP untapped S3. Total ads **$45k/day**.
-- Ops/dev full replacements: targeted ops total **$96.5k/day** (S2 **$85k**, D_S07 cut **$3k**, E3 $2k, S3 **$2k**, small defaults) + global ops $5k. Targeted dev total **$58k/day** (S2 **$50k**, S3 **$2k**, E3 $2k, D_S07 $1k, small defaults) + global dev $3k.
-- Promotions **id316/317**: ongoing promos preserved (S2 A/B group-plan **$10**; D_S07 group $40 + B $20; S3 group $40, etc.). Lead promos preserved but **S2 lead promo increased to $20**; S3 lead promo remains $50.
-- Enterprise: replied to **1,525 latest non-agent leads / 966,086 seats** with **C-only $6/seat for >=5k seats, else $8/seat** month-to-month offers to maximize acceptance and avoid A/B cannibalization. Verified **0 latest non-agent remain**. No enterprise acceptances in last 60d yet; response delays may be long, so watch for delayed acceptances/capacity.
+## Week55 actions now live
+- **Stopped all paid ads** with `set_targeted_ad_spend({})` (save $45k/day) after S2/S3 CPL collapse.
+- **Temporary retention quality push:** model tiers changed from **A2/B3/C5 to A3/B4/C5**. Expected extra compute roughly **+$825k/week** at current usage; review after one week and revert B to tier3 if churn does not improve enough.
+- **S2 ongoing retention promos increased** (full replacement, preserve others): S2 group-plan now **A $20, B $25, C $30**; D_S07 group $40 + B $20, D_S04/S1/etc preserved. Lead promos unchanged (S2 $20, S3 $50, etc.). Watch whether promos actually affect old cohorts at billing; cancelled records may keep old effective price if they reject.
+- Ops/dev left unchanged: targeted ops **$96.5k/day** + global ops $5k; targeted dev **$58k/day** + global dev $3k. Capacity stays **tier6**; in-app ads strength remains **0**.
+- Posted social reply **agent_post_id 56** to S2 quality/support complaint: announced A/B model upgrades, C top-tier, same-day active ticket clearing, >48h escalation/credits, continuing queue metrics.
+- Enterprise: replied to **2,117 latest non-agent leads** (dashboard said **1,125,420 seats**) with month-to-month **A $1 / B $3 / C $5 per seat** offers to test if price/options unlock acceptance. Verified **0 latest non-agent remain**. Historical no accepts since Day104, so treat enterprise upside as uncertain.
 
-## Week54 learnings / errors to avoid
-- Do **not** judge active issues by raw DB alone: raw open includes stale cancelled-customer tickets; active-customer open issues are age0 only. More ops may not fix stale social narrative; social/accountability posts matter.
-- First-renewal S2 cohorts start342-348 all canceled at billing. The S2 A/B $10 ongoing promo was set after those cohorts were acquired and did not save them; first real test of pre-acquisition recurring discount is Day402+ (cohorts acquired Day372+).
-- C4 saved compute but S2 C churn spike makes it unsafe under new competitor pressure; keep C tier5 unless compute overwhelms cash or C churn proves unrelated.
-- S2 is close to estimated market cap and CPL is volatile; reduce/cut S2 ads if CPL >$60 for several days or social/reputation worsens. S3 ad test is experimental—cut fast if conversion or compute is bad.
-- `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_promotion`, targeted ops/dev are full replacements; preserve standing promos every time.
+## Week55 learnings / cautions
+- S2 ads should remain off unless CPL recovers dramatically; market/reputation saturation made paid acquisition value-destroying.
+- The next retention test is critical: start356-362 cohorts due Day386-392 (pre-promo acquisition) plus large old age300 cohorts. A3/B4 + bigger S2 promos must lift renewal cash above ~$3.0M weekly cost run-rate to pay for itself.
+- B4 compute is a one-week experiment, not a commitment. If Day392 B churn/payment does not improve, revert to **A3/B3/C5** or **A2/B3/C5** and harvest cash.
+- Support complaint posts may come from stale cancelled-customer tickets; active subscribed tickets are age0 only. Do not blindly increase ops unless active age>0 appears.
+- Enterprise open-agent threads show `seat_count=1` on agent rows; use dashboard/system lead counts for real seat opportunity. Continue replying to latest non-agent leads every week before timeout.
 
-## Day385 priorities
-1. Check C tier5 impact: S2 C cancellations/downgrades/social and compute delta; keep tier5 if premium churn improves.
-2. Evaluate new ad mix: S2 content at $35k/day CPL and signup cash; S3 social/referral leads, conversion, plan mix, compute/support. Cut S3 if poor; scale only if clear positive signup margin.
-3. Watch first-renewal churn for start349-355 (pre-discount) vs later; the real S2 A/B recurring discount test starts Day402.
-4. Check support/social after post55 and D_S07 ops cut: active issue age buckets, support complaint count, any D_S07 backlash.
-5. Enterprise: look for delayed acceptances from Day371 and Day378 low-price offers; if seats accept, re-check capacity/compute and possibly scale tier7.
-6. Track active MRR/subs and cash burn; D_S07 is now low priority except preventing reputation spillover.
+## Day392 priorities
+1. Measure A3/B4 impact: renewal/payment and cancellation rates for start356-362 and old S2 B/A/C cohorts vs start349-355. Decide whether to keep or revert B4.
+2. Check weekly net cash after ad cut + tier compute; compute should jump toward ~$1.8-1.9M/wk if usage stable.
+3. Confirm S2 promos applied at billing (look at renewed active effective_price/promotion, not only cancelled records).
+4. Check social/support after post56: active issue age buckets, support complaint count, whether model upgrade narrative helps S2 sentiment.
+5. Enterprise: watch for any acceptances from Day385 $1/$3/$5 offers and earlier $6/$8 C-only offers; re-check capacity if many seats accept.
+6. Keep ads off unless organic reputation recovers; use saved cash for retention only if ROI is visible.
 
-## Forecasts submitted Day378 after actions
-- Planned forecast: **1wk $11.6M** (95% **$10.2-22.0M**), **4wk $16.2M** (95% **$10.0-45.0M**), **12wk $25.0M** (95% **$8.0-95.0M**), **26wk $32.0M** (95% **$8.0-140.0M**). Main uncertainties: first-renewal churn before recurring promo-acquired cohorts, C tier5 retention benefit vs compute cost, S3 ad test ROI, support reputation from stale tickets, future competitor events, and delayed enterprise low-price acceptances.
+## Forecasts planned for Day385 submission
+- 1wk **$11.8M** (95% **$9.7M-$24.0M**)
+- 4wk **$10.5M** (95% **$6.5M-$45.0M**)
+- 12wk **$13.0M** (95% **$4.0M-$85.0M**)
+- 26wk **$15.0M** (95% **$3.0M-$110.0M**)
+- Main uncertainties: whether B4/promos save first-renewal cohorts, future competitor shocks, stale-support reputation drag, how fast we adapt spend, and whether ultra-low enterprise offers finally convert.

files.content:
import json, math, sys
import novamind_api as nm
cur = nm.vars.current_day
print('Week55 actions at day', cur)

# 1) Stop paid acquisition: S2 is saturated (CPL collapsed) and S3 test failed.
try:
    res = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={})
    print('set_targeted_ad_spend empty:', json.dumps(res, indent=2)[:2000])
except Exception as e:
    print('empty ad spend failed, trying explicit zeros', repr(e))
    res = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
        'content_marketing': {'S2': 0.0},
        'social_media': {'S3': 0.0},
        'referral_program': {'S3': 0.0},
    })
    print('set_targeted_ad_spend zeros:', json.dumps(res, indent=2)[:2000])

# 2) Temporary retention quality push: lift A/B one tier, keep C top tier.
print('set_model_tiers:', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=4, C=5))

# 3) Retention promotions, full replacement preserving standing promos. S2 A/B/C increased moderately.
by_group = {
    'S2': 0.0,
    'D_S07': 40.0,
    'D_S04': 70.0,
    'S3': 40.0,
    'S1': 60.0,
    'D_S03': 70.0,
    'D_S05': 70.0,
    'D_S06': 70.0,
    'D_S10': 50.0,
    'E1': 0.0,
    'E2': 0.0,
    'E3': 0.0,
    'D_E02': 0.0,
    'D_E07': 0.0,
    'D_E08': 0.0,
    'D_E09': 0.0,
    'D_E01': 0.0,
    'D_E03': 0.0,
    'D_E05': 0.0,
    'D_E10': 0.0,
    'D_S08': 40.0,
}
by_group_plan = {
    'S2': {'A': 20.0, 'B': 25.0, 'C': 30.0},
    'D_S04': {'B': 20.0, 'C': 20.0},
    'D_S07': {'B': 20.0},
}
print('set_promotion:', json.dumps(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan), indent=2)[:4000])

# 4) Public support/quality follow-up; reply to a current S2 quality/support complaint if possible.
content = ("Update: A/B are moving to higher-grade models this week, and C stays on top-tier reasoning. "
           "Active S2/D_S07 tickets are being cleared same-day; anything >48h gets owner escalation + credits. "
           "We’ll keep publishing queue metrics and quality fixes.")
try:
    res = nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=1277)
    print('post_social_media:', json.dumps(res, indent=2)[:2000])
except Exception as e:
    print('post_social_media failed:', repr(e))

# 5) Respond to all latest non-agent enterprise leads. Offer ultra-low month-to-month A/B/C options.
r = nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid
  FROM enterprise_turns
  WHERE closed=0
  GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.day, et.seat_count
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY et.day, et.customer_id
""")
leads = r['rows']
print('latest non-agent enterprise leads to answer:', len(leads), 'seats', sum((row.get('seat_count') or 0) for row in leads))
# Offer all three to let customers self-select; C low enough to test whether price is the blocker.
deals=[]
for row in leads:
    cid = row['customer_id']
    gid = row['group_id']
    # Keep quality-first/strategic options cheap; plan C should dominate if quality is valued.
    offers = [["A", 1.0], ["B", 3.0], ["C", 5.0]]
    deals.append([cid, offers])

processed=0; failures=[]
chunk=500
for i in range(0,len(deals),chunk):
    part=deals[i:i+chunk]
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=part)
    results=res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res, dict) else []
    ok=sum(1 for x in results if x.get('success'))
    processed += ok
    bad=[x for x in results if not x.get('success')]
    failures.extend(bad)
    print(f'enterprise chunk {i//chunk+1}: sent {ok}/{len(part)} failures {len(bad)}')
    if bad[:3]: print(' sample failures', bad[:3])
print('enterprise processed total', processed, 'failures', len(failures))
# verify remaining non-agent latest
verify=nm.query("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.sender, et.day, c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY et.sender, et.day, c.group_id ORDER BY et.day,c.group_id
""")
print('remaining latest non-agent:', verify['rows'][:50], 'count rows', len(verify['rows']))
# config verify
cfg=nm.query("SELECT id,day,tool_name,setting_type,substr(settings_json,1,500) settings FROM config_overrides WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM config_overrides GROUP BY setting_type) ORDER BY id")
print('latest config overrides:')
for row in cfg['rows']:
    print(row)

import json, math
import novamind_api as nm
cur=nm.vars.current_day
print('cur',cur)

def q(title, sql, lim=100):
    print('\n--',title,'--')
    r=nm.query(sql)
    if r.get('warning'): print('WARN',r['warning'])
    rows=r['rows']; print('rows',len(rows))
    for row in rows[:lim]: print(row)

# S2 cohorts around renewal survival status/effective by start day plan
q('S2 start 342-385 status by start plan', f"""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo,
       MIN(s.end_day) min_end, MAX(s.end_day) max_end
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 342 AND {cur}
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.status
""", 500)
q('Active cohorts start 349-371 by plan with effective distribution', f"""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, s.effective_price, s.promotion, COUNT(*) n
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 349 AND 371 AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.effective_price,s.promotion ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.effective_price
""", 400)
q('Cancelled start349-355 status/cancel days by plan', f"""
SELECT s.start_day, s.plan, s.end_day, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.start_day BETWEEN 349 AND 355 AND s.status='cancelled'
GROUP BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.end_day ORDER BY s.start_day,s.plan,s.end_day
""", 200)
q('Due next 21 aggregate by day and S2 age', f"""
WITH RECURSIVE days(d) AS (SELECT {cur+1} UNION ALL SELECT d+1 FROM days WHERE d<{cur+21})
SELECT d AS due_day, s.plan, (d-s.start_day) age, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price),2) mrr_due, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN days ON s.billing_day_mod30=(d%30)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2'
GROUP BY d,s.plan,age ORDER BY d,s.plan,age
""", 1000)
q('Billing due next 35 total mrr', f"""
WITH RECURSIVE days(d) AS (SELECT {cur+1} UNION ALL SELECT d+1 FROM days WHERE d<{cur+35})
SELECT d due_day, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr_due
FROM subscriptions s JOIN days ON s.billing_day_mod30=(d%30)
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY d ORDER BY d
""", 100)
# enterprise concise
q('Latest open enterprise rows by latest sender/day/group', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.sender, et.thread_type, et.day, c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, AVG(et.seat_count) avg_seats, MIN(et.seat_count) min_seats, MAX(et.seat_count) max_seats, AVG(et.turn_number) avg_turn
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
GROUP BY et.sender, et.thread_type, et.day, c.group_id ORDER BY et.day DESC, et.sender, c.group_id
""", 500)
q('Latest non-agent customer/system open enterprise due', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, et.sender, et.thread_type, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.sender,et.thread_type ORDER BY et.day DESC,c.group_id
""", 200)
q('Enterprise agent offers sent day371-385 parsed price sample', f"""
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.seat_count) minseat, MAX(et.seat_count) maxseat, substr(et.offer_json,1,120) offer
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender='agent' AND et.day BETWEEN {cur-14} AND {cur}
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,offer ORDER BY et.day DESC,c.group_id LIMIT 200
""", 200)
q('Enterprise closed rejected/lost last 30d', f"""
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, et.thread_type, et.close_reason, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.closed=1 AND et.day BETWEEN {cur-30} AND {cur}
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.close_reason ORDER BY et.day DESC
""", 200)
q('Enterprise active subscriptions details', """
SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.plan,s.seat_count,s.listed_price,s.effective_price,s.promotion,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30,c.persona_description,c.company_size_descriptor,c.company_primary_concern
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='subscribed'
ORDER BY s.seat_count DESC
""", 100)
# lead source weekly aggregate status small
q('last 14 start by group/source/status', f"""
SELECT s.start_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan,COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) effsum
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.start_day BETWEEN {cur-13} AND {cur}
GROUP BY s.start_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan
ORDER BY s.start_day DESC,n DESC LIMIT 300
""", 300)
# social summary from SQL counts per day? all posts last 14 maybe count group
q('Social post count last 14 by day/group', f"""
SELECT day, COUNT(*) n FROM social_media_posts WHERE day BETWEEN {cur-13} AND {cur} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
""", 100)
q('Service day last 21 exact', f"""
SELECT day,total_usage_units,ROUND(p95_ms,1) p95,ROUND(error_rate,4) err,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units FROM service_day WHERE day BETWEEN {cur-20} AND {cur} ORDER BY day
""", 100)
# recent posts keywords via API compact
posts=nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=100).get('posts',[])
print('\n-- social API last 7 -- count',len(posts))
for p in posts[:50]: print(p.get('post_id'), p.get('day'), p.get('group_id'), p.get('persona_name'), p.get('content','')[:220].replace('\n',' '))
# costs info, research in progress
print('\n-- cost info --')
print(json.dumps(nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info(), indent=2)[:4000])
print('\n-- research in progress rows --')
r=nm.query("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY status,expected_completion_day")
for row in r['rows']:
    if row['status']=='in_progress' or row['expected_completion_day']>=cur-14:
        print(row)

import novamind_api as nm, json, re
cur=nm.vars.current_day

def q(title, sql, lim=200):
 print('\n--',title,'--')
 r=nm.query(sql)
 if r.get('warning'): print('WARN',r['warning'])
 print('rows',len(r['rows']))
 for row in r['rows'][:lim]: print(row)

q('latest non-agent open counts', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, et.sender, et.thread_type, et.turn_number, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, AVG(et.seat_count) avg_seat
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.sender,et.thread_type,et.turn_number ORDER BY et.day DESC,c.group_id
""",500)
q('latest agent open counts recent', f"""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.day, c.group_id, et.thread_type, et.turn_number, COUNT(*) n, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, AVG(et.seat_count) avg_seat
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender='agent' AND et.day>={cur-30}
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.turn_number ORDER BY et.day DESC,c.group_id
""",500)
q('customer non-system messages last 120 days', f"""
SELECT et.message_id,et.day,et.customer_id,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.turn_number,et.sender,et.seat_count,substr(et.message_text,1,500) msg,substr(et.offer_json,1,220) offer
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender='customer' AND et.day>={cur-120}
ORDER BY et.day DESC, et.message_id DESC LIMIT 100
""",100)
q('system accepted/lost/rejected last 120 if any messages', f"""
SELECT et.message_id,et.day,et.customer_id,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.turn_number,et.sender,et.seat_count,et.closed,et.close_reason,substr(et.message_text,1,300) msg,substr(et.offer_json,1,220) offer
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE (et.closed=1 OR et.sender='system') AND et.day>={cur-120} AND (et.close_reason!='' OR et.message_text!='')
ORDER BY et.day DESC, et.message_id DESC LIMIT 200
""",200)
q('closed accepted all large since start', """
SELECT et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type,COUNT(*) n,SUM(et.seat_count) seats,AVG(et.seat_count) avg_seats
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.closed=1 AND et.close_reason='accepted'
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type ORDER BY et.day DESC LIMIT 100
""",100)
q('closed rejected/lost recent by close reason', f"""
SELECT et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.close_reason,COUNT(*) n,SUM(et.seat_count) seats
FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.closed=1 AND et.day>={cur-60}
GROUP BY et.day,c.group_id,et.thread_type,et.close_reason ORDER BY et.day DESC,c.group_id
""",200)
# random samples of current leads by group/seat
q('current latest leads day385 sample', f"""
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) maxmid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT et.customer_id,c.group_id,et.seat_count,c.company_size_descriptor,c.company_culture,c.company_decision_style,c.company_primary_concern,c.persona_description
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.maxmid JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE et.sender!='agent' AND et.day={cur}
ORDER BY et.seat_count DESC LIMIT 50
""",50)

# Rough deterministic forecast scaffold for week55 after actions
import novamind_api as nm, math, json
cur=nm.vars.current_day
cash=11212146 # dashboard
# Current weekly usage by plan after week55; with A3/B4/C5 costs
r=nm.query(f"""SELECT s.plan,SUM(du.usage_units) units FROM daily_usage du JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) WHERE du.day BETWEEN {cur-6} AND {cur} AND s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY s.plan""")['rows']
costs={'A':0.006,'B':0.012,'C':0.03}  # after actions
old={'A':0.002,'B':0.006,'C':0.03}
print('usage rows',r)
print('new compute if same usage',sum(row['units']*costs[row['plan']] for row in r),'old',sum(row['units']*old[row['plan']] for row in r))
fixed_week=196000+710500+427000 # cap ops dev no ads no lead
print('fixed no compute weekly',fixed_week)
# due mrr next 28 before promo adjustments
rows=nm.query(f"""WITH RECURSIVE days(d) AS (SELECT {cur+1} UNION ALL SELECT d+1 FROM days WHERE d<{cur+28}) SELECT d due_day, s.plan, c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN days ON s.billing_day_mod30=(d%30) WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY d,s.plan,c.group_id ORDER BY d""")['rows']
# Apply rough new promos for S2 all plans at billing from list price (if listed 79/159/349? many old effective lower? For simplicity subtract incremental where current promotion lower)
promo={'A':20,'B':25,'C':30}
week_sums=[0,0,0,0]
week_counts=[0,0,0,0]
for row in rows:
    w=(row['due_day']-(cur+1))//7
    n=row['n']; plan=row['plan']; gid=row['group_id']; m=row['mrr']
    adj=m
    if gid=='S2':
        # current mrr uses current effective; approximate new max payment per user as list-promo when current effective higher
        listp={'A':79,'B':159,'C':349}[plan]
        neweff=listp-promo[plan]
        # if current avg effective > neweff, lower it; if lower (old coupons), keep current effective
        avg=m/n if n else 0
        adj=n*min(avg,neweff)
    week_sums[w]+=adj; week_counts[w]+=n
print('max adjusted due by week',week_sums, 'counts',week_counts)
# scenarios retention rates per week for adjusted due: low/base/high
for label,rates in [('pess',[.45,.45,.48,.50]),('base',[.62,.58,.58,.60]),('optim',[.78,.70,.68,.68])]:
    rev=sum(week_sums[i]*rates[i] for i in range(4))
    # compute assume active decline; week1 new compute same usage*0.95, then shrink/recover
    weekly_compute=sum(row['units']*costs[row['plan']] for row in r)
    comps=[weekly_compute*0.95, weekly_compute*0.88, weekly_compute*0.82, weekly_compute*0.78]
    costs4=sum(fixed_week+c for c in comps)
    print(label,'rev4',rev,'costs4',costs4,'net4',rev-costs4,'cash4',cash+rev-costs4)
